summary: Tested admin panel settings tab restructure. All 5 new SETTINGS tabs verified (Organization Info, Auth & Pages, Forms, System Config, Custom Domains). Website Content tab correctly removed. Documents Page slide with 6 fields working. OrgAddressSection visible for partner admin, hidden for platform admin. Backend: Fixed critical missing documents fields in WebsiteSettingsUpdate model and DEFAULT_WEBSITE_SETTINGS. All 17 backend tests pass.

critical.issue: FIXED: nav_documents_label, documents_page_title, documents_page_subtitle, documents_page_upload_label, documents_page_upload_hint, documents_page_empty_text were missing from WebsiteSettingsUpdate Pydantic model (models.py) and DEFAULT_WEBSITE_SETTINGS dict (routes/admin/website.py). Result: PUT silently ignored these fields; GET did not return them; TopNav ws.nav_documents_label always fell back to 'Documents'; Documents.tsx ws.* fields always used hardcoded defaults.

ui_bugs.issue: Province/State select dropdown shows empty when stored address uses full province name (e.g. 'Alberta') instead of abbreviation ('AB'). Provinces API returns value='AB', label='Alberta'. If address was saved with full name via API, dropdown won't show selection. UI saves correctly (abbreviation), so only affects programmatically-saved data.

setup_checklist_widget.org-info navigation via handleChecklistN: PASS (brand_customized item was completed for test tenant)

action_items: LOW: Province display in OrgAddressSection shows empty when region stored as full name ('Alberta') vs abbreviation ('AB'). Only affects programmatically-saved data. UI saves abbreviations correctly. Consider normalizing on save or accepting both formats in the dropdown.
INFO: System Config tab shows empty content for platform admin in 'All Tenants' mode. This is expected behavior as there are no Operations/FeatureFlags settings for the default tenant.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: WebsiteSettingsUpdate Pydantic model (models.py) was missing 6 documents page fields. Pydantic silently strips unknown fields, so PUT /admin/website-settings accepted the payload with 200 but didn't save the fields. This caused ws.nav_documents_label/documents_page_* to always use hardcoded fallbacks.
FIXED: DEFAULT_WEBSITE_SETTINGS in routes/admin/website.py was also missing the 6 documents page fields, so GET didn't return them even as empty strings.
NOTE: OrgAddressSection correctly places hooks before early return (React Rules of Hooks compliance - the iter133 violation is fixed).
NOTE: handleChecklistNavigate in Admin.tsx correctly maps old 'website' tab references to new split tabs (org-info, auth-pages, forms-tab, system-config).

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 tests pass after fixing documents fields)
success_rate.frontend: 97% (all major features working, 1 minor province display issue)

seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST_valid_iter133@test.local partner from iter133. Backend tests updated address data for this tenant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter134 tested the admin panel settings tab restructure (4 new tabs: org-info, auth-pages, forms-tab, system-config replacing old website tab). Fixed critical backend bug: documents page fields missing from WebsiteSettingsUpdate model and DEFAULT_WEBSITE_SETTINGS. Test partner admin: TEST_valid_iter133@test.local / ChangeMe123! / test-org-iter133-valid. Platform admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. Two-step login: first enter partner code, then credentials.

documents_fields_missing_from_backend.issue: ws.nav_documents_label and ws.documents_page_* fields in TopNav.tsx and Documents.tsx always used hardcoded fallbacks
documents_fields_missing_from_backend.root_cause: Two-part backend omission: (1) WebsiteSettingsUpdate Pydantic model in models.py did not include the 6 documents fields, causing Pydantic to silently drop them on PUT. (2) DEFAULT_WEBSITE_SETTINGS dict in routes/admin/website.py did not include these fields, causing GET to not return them at all.
documents_fields_missing_from_backend.fix: Added nav_documents_label, documents_page_title, documents_page_subtitle, documents_page_upload_label, documents_page_upload_hint, documents_page_empty_text to both WebsiteSettingsUpdate (models.py) and DEFAULT_WEBSITE_SETTINGS (routes/admin/website.py).
documents_fields_missing_from_backend.verification: All 3 previously failing tests now pass: test_website_settings_includes_documents_fields, test_documents_settings_saved_and_retrievable, test_public_website_settings_includes_documents_fields
